# Exceptions

## Imports

## Notebook Location

Track where an error/warning originated in the source notebooks.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

<a
href="https://github.com/s01st/nbdev-mcp/blob/main/nbdev_mcp/utils/exceptions.py#L19"
target="_blank" style="float:right; font-size:smaller">source</a>

### NotebookLocation

>  NotebookLocation (notebook:str, cell:int=-1, line:int=0)

*Track the source location of an error within nbdev notebooks.*

Args: notebook: Name or path of the source notebook (e.g.,
‘03_utils.ipynb’). cell: Zero-based cell index where the error occurred.
line: One-based line number within the cell (default 0 = unknown).

## Base Exception

------------------------------------------------------------------------

<a
href="https://github.com/s01st/nbdev-mcp/blob/main/nbdev_mcp/utils/exceptions.py#L55"
target="_blank" style="float:right; font-size:smaller">source</a>

### NotebookException

>  NotebookException (message:str,
>                         location:Optional[__main__.NotebookLocation]=None)

*Base exception for nbdev-mcp with optional notebook location tracking.*

Args: message: The error message. location: Optional source location in
the notebooks where the error originated.

### ProjectNotFoundError

>  ProjectNotFoundError (selector:str)

*Raised when an nbdev project cannot be found or resolved.*

Args: selector: The selector/path that failed to resolve.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

<a
href="https://github.com/s01st/nbdev-mcp/blob/main/nbdev_mcp/utils/exceptions.py#L80"
target="_blank" style="float:right; font-size:smaller">source</a>

### NotebookNotFoundError

>  NotebookNotFoundError (path:Any)

*Raised when a notebook file cannot be found.*

Args: path: The notebook path that was not found.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

<a
href="https://github.com/s01st/nbdev-mcp/blob/main/nbdev_mcp/utils/exceptions.py#L91"
target="_blank" style="float:right; font-size:smaller">source</a>

### CellNotFoundError

>  CellNotFoundError (notebook:str, cell_index:int, total_cells:int)

*Raised when a cell index is out of range.*

Args: notebook: The notebook name. cell_index: The invalid cell index.
total_cells: The actual number of cells in the notebook.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

<a
href="https://github.com/s01st/nbdev-mcp/blob/main/nbdev_mcp/utils/exceptions.py#L109"
target="_blank" style="float:right; font-size:smaller">source</a>

### ExportError

>  ExportError (message:str,
>                   location:Optional[__main__.NotebookLocation]=None)

*Raised when nbdev_export fails.*

Args: message: Error details from the export command. location: Source
location if known.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

<a
href="https://github.com/s01st/nbdev-mcp/blob/main/nbdev_mcp/utils/exceptions.py#L119"
target="_blank" style="float:right; font-size:smaller">source</a>

### LintError

>  LintError (rule:str, message:str,
>                 location:Optional[__main__.NotebookLocation]=None)

*Raised when linting finds a blocking issue.*

Args: rule: The lint rule that was violated. message: Description of the
violation. location: Source location of the violation.

Args: message: The warning message. location: Source location in the
notebooks.

## Helper Functions

------------------------------------------------------------------------

<a
href="https://github.com/s01st/nbdev-mcp/blob/main/nbdev_mcp/utils/exceptions.py#L156"
target="_blank" style="float:right; font-size:smaller">source</a>

### warn_with_location

>  warn_with_location (message:str, notebook:Optional[str]=None,
>                          cell:int=-1, line:int=0, category:type=<class
>                          '__main__.NbdevMcpWarning'>)

*Issue a warning with notebook location context.*

Args: message: The warning message. notebook: Name of the source
notebook. cell: Zero-based cell index (default -1 = unknown). line:
One-based line number within cell (default 0 = unknown). category:
Warning category class (default NbdevMcpWarning).

------------------------------------------------------------------------

<a
href="https://github.com/s01st/nbdev-mcp/blob/main/nbdev_mcp/utils/exceptions.py#L176"
target="_blank" style="float:right; font-size:smaller">source</a>

### raise_with_location

>  raise_with_location (message:str, notebook:Optional[str]=None,
>                           cell:int=-1, line:int=0, exc_class:type=<class
>                           '__main__.NotebookException'>)

*Raise an exception with notebook location context.*

Args: message: The error message. notebook: Name of the source notebook.
cell: Zero-based cell index (default -1 = unknown). line: One-based line
number within cell (default 0 = unknown). exc_class: Exception class to
raise (default NotebookException).

Raises: NotebookException: Or subclass specified by exc_class.
